title: Tadej Pogačar Could Lose a Key Tour de France Helper to a Freak Bus Crash
content:
Jhonatan Narváez's Giro d'Italia ended when he rode into a team bus and now the injury could cost him the final spot on Pogačar's Tour de France squad.

Read the full article at Tadej Pogačar Could Lose a Key Tour de France Helper to a Freak Bus Crash on Velo.
author: ahood
